title: FIGS Reports Mixed 2023 Financial Results Amidst CFO Transition
text: FIGS reported mixed 2023 results with full year revenues of $545.6 million (up 7.9% YoY) and net income of $22.6 million (diluted EPS $0.12). Company faced gross margin pressure from product mix shift and higher duties, though benefits from lower freight costs partially offset headwinds. Q4 2023 showed flat revenue growth at $144.9 million while gross margins compressed to 67.5%. Results came during transition period with CFO changes. Company continuing focus on international expansion, product innovation, and omnichannel strategy.
